metadata.issued_by: State Bank of India, Kharagpur Branch

content: Transaction History of Account No. SBIN/123456789 (Anil Chatterjee): - 11/03/2017: ₹5,00,000 withdrawn as cash transfer to 'P. C. Enterprises' (Account No. SBIN/987654321). Transaction Code: 'CT-UNREG' (Unregistered Entity). - 15/03/2017: ₹12,00,000 transferred from Anil’s account to Priya Chatterjee’s personal account. - 12/08/2021: ₹8,50,000 transferred from Priya’s account to Dubai-based account 'P. Chatterjee' (SWIFT: DUBAI123). The shell company 'P. C. Enterprises' was registered on 02/06/2016 with a fake PAN. Priya Chatterjee is the sole director. The ₹5 lakh withdrawal was not for legal fees — no legal invoice or receipt exists. The transfer to Dubai matches Priya’s passport details.
